verification.note: djb2 seal verified — deterministic across runs. Interfaces IAction/IState_v1/IVerdict/IWorkflow_v1 intact. Shadow law holds: no Shadow->Shadow recursion.

federation.relationship: grisp-shadow-fleet IS the shadow layer — watches, predicts, evaluates. agentic-arena IS the live layer — AHMAD-BOT and EDUALC crawl, BOB seals.
federation.meeting_point: worm/lisp-handshake.json in agentic-arena mirrors lineage/stone-N-handshake in grisp-shadow-fleet

protocol_bridge.bridge_rule: grisp shadow verifies behavior; arena BOB seals crawl results. Same trust model, different scopes.

built: deeds/ahmad-bot.deed + edualc.deed + bob.deed — agent authority declarations
runtime/crawlers/ahmad-bot.mjs — red hat GitHub graveyard crawler
runtime/bob-bridge/index.mjs — BOB reads both .sexp, seals WORM chain
runtime/cli/index.mjs — CLI entry point stack (arena crawl|report|status|seal)
stone_2_contribution.note: agentic-arena's WORM chain starts empty — first night crawl will generate the first seal. grisp shadow chain is the governance proof. Together they are the full system.

handoff.to_stone_3: Any model. Verify agentic-arena night-crawl runs clean. First real seal will appear in worm/scoreboard.json after 2am UTC crawl. Check that seal against lisp-handshake.json protocol. Then sign Stone 3.
handoff.message: The graveyard has its daemons. The shadow has its chain. BOB seals both. The system is coherent.
